San Diego real estate

A thoughtful approach to buying and selling in San Diego

Clear strategy, steady guidance, and thoughtful representation for buyers and sellers throughout San Diego County.

Schedule a conversation Browse resources

Real estate guidance with clarity and intention

Whether you’re buying your first home, preparing to sell, or simply exploring your options, I help you move forward with structure, strategy, and calm support from start to close.

How can I help?

For buyers

A clearer path from search to closing, with guidance on strategy, showings, offers, inspections, and the steps in between.

Explore the buyers page

For sellers

Thoughtful preparation, smart pricing, elevated presentation, and steady support through listing, negotiation, and closing.

Explore the sellers page

What guides my approach

Clarity first

Every good decision starts with understanding your goals, timing, and priorities — not pressure.

Thoughtful strategy

I focus on preparation, positioning, and informed decision-making so you can move forward with confidence.

Steady support

Real estate can feel emotional and fast-moving. My role is to keep the process organized, understandable, and grounded at every stage.

Featured resources

Practical guides designed to make buying or selling feel more informed and less overwhelming.

Buyer guide

The Buying Process

A clear overview of what to expect from first search to closing day.

Seller guide

Prep to Sell Checklist

A practical checklist to help prepare your home for launch.

Guide

Offer Terms Explained

Understand the terms that matter most in negotiation.

Worksheet

Selling Timeline Planner

A simple way to map out preparation, listing, escrow, and your next move.

Ready to take the next step?

Whether you’re buying, selling, or simply exploring your options, I’d be happy to help you think through your timeline and next move.
